query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('S1242','S1260','S1235','S1323','S1081','S1069','S1059')
ORDER BY bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('S1242','S1260','S1235','S1323','S1081','S1069','S1059')
ORDER BY bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
